summary: The diff shows implementation of REQ-2 through REQ-7 in SchemeInfo.tsx and related translation files, and REQ-1 logo display in Header.tsx. All phase content, Why Choose, and Contact sections appear implemented in code. However, the actual logo image file (bhagyalaxmi-logo.dim_400x400.png) is not present in the diff as an added file, raising a concern about REQ-1's image asset requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Logo image saved as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/ matching the uploaded screenshot (dark navy background, gold/amber gradient lightning bolt through a sun/crescent symbol)
missing_requirements.reason: The Header.tsx references the image at /assets/generated/bhagyalaxmi-logo.dim_400x400.png and the frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms usage, but the diff shows no ADDED FILES — the actual image binary was not added or regenerated in this diff. The AC requires the image to be saved as a static asset matching the uploaded screenshot exactly.
